name: Mary Yarborough Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cherries, drained crushed pineapple, flour, and sugar.
2. Cook until thick. Remove from heat and add the Jello. Stir until well combined and let cool.
3. Add the bananas and chopped nuts.
4. Pour into graham cracker crust.
5. Top with whipped cream and serve.
